---
title: "Prueba Quarto"
format: html
---

# Encabezado

Documento de prueba para validar Quarto desde Neovim.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
greet <- function(name) paste0("Hola, ", name, "!")
greet("Neovim + Quarto")
```

```{python}
def squares(nums):
    return [n * n for n in nums]

squares([1, 2, 3, 4])
```
